uplink.description: Acceleration vector uplink (TTN example input) -> acceleration extras
uplink._note: Header 0x00 0x71, three signed16 BE * 0.001 g. Bytes after header: X=[2A,00]=0x2A00=10752->10.752, Y=[00,80]=0x0080=128->0.128, Z=[05,C4]=0x05C4=1476->1.476. Matches upstream acceleration {x,y,z}; raw axes are not a motion event, so surfaced as camelCase extras.

uplink.description: Accelerometer motion alarm asserted -> action.motion.detected true
uplink._note: Header 0x00 0x00, uint8 accel_alarm_status=1 (non-zero) -> motion detected. This is the genuine real-time motion event that satisfies the motion category.

uplink.description: Accelerometer motion alarm cleared -> action.motion.detected false
Full data frame: motion alarm + acceleration + battery + temperature + humidity
uplink._note: Concatenated TLVs. Battery 0x64=100: eos bit7=0, life=(100*0.01)+2.5=3.5 V. Temp 0x00FA=250*0.1=25.0 C. Humidity 0x64=100*0.5=50 %. Covers action.motion plus battery and air.

uplink.description: Battery end-of-service alert set -> batteryEosAlert true, low voltage

uplink._note: Header 0x00 0x99 is not a known SPARROW field; decoder must reject rather than silently mis-parse.
fPort 100 carries configuration registers, not normalized measurements; only fPort 10 data uplinks are decoded.
